Release notes:
# Release Notes for v40.9.2
## Fixes
* Fixed an issue where `nodeIntegrationInWorker` didn't always work in AudioWorklet. [#51004](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51004) <sup>(Also in [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51006), [42](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51005))</sup>
* Fixed bug that could occasionally cause browserWindow's `always-on-top-changed` even to fire with incorrect values. [#51134](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51134) <sup>(Also in [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51135), [42](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51133))</sup>

## Other Changes
* Fixed `gn gen` failing to resolve `electron_version` when building from a `git worktree` checkout. [#51164](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51164) <sup>(Also in [39](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51163), [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51165), [42](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51166))</sup>
* Security: backported fixes for CVE-2026-6297, CVE-2026-6299, CVE-2026-6358, CVE-2026-6359, CVE-2026-6300, CVE-2026-6303, CVE-2026-6308, CVE-2026-6309, CVE-2026-6360, CVE-2026-6311, CVE-2026-6313, CVE-2026-6314, CVE-2026-6316, CVE-2026-6362, CVE-2026-6301, CVE-2026-6307, CVE-2026-6363, CVE-2026-6298, CVE-2026-6304, CVE-2026-6364, CVE-2026-6296, CVE-2026-6305, CVE-2026-6306, CVE-2026-6361, CVE-2026-6302, CVE-2026-6318. [#51139](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51139)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the electron/electron release v40.9.2, fixes include resolving an issue where nodeIntegrationInWorker did not always work in AudioWorklet, correcting a bug that could cause browserWindow's always-on-top-changed event to fire with incorrect values, and fixing a test scaffolding bug when running tests locally on Linux. Repository: electron/electron

Tag: v41.3.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-04-22T23:06:30Z; created_at: 2026-04-22T21:04:18Z
Release notes:
# Release Notes for v41.3.0
## Fixes
* Fixed `webContents.printToPDF` rejecting on all subsequent calls after a prior call was rejected with an invalid `pageRanges` value. [#51221](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51221) <sup>(Also in [40](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51220), [42](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51222))</sup>
* Fixed an issue where `app-region: drag` inside a hidden `WebContentsView` would still drag the parent window on Windows. [#51246](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51246) <sup>(Also in [40](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51247), [42](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51245))</sup>
* Fixed an issue where an Electron macOS update would not be applied if another app was previously blocking the macOS system update loop. [#51210](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51210) <sup>(Also in [40](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51211), [42](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51212))</sup>
* Fixed build failure when building with `enable_pdf` disabled. [#51248](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51248) <sup>(Also in [42](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/50846))</sup>
* Fixed frameless transparent windows on Windows losing their transparency after `setResizable(false)` followed by `setResizable(true)`. [#51217](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51217) <sup>(Also in [42](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51218))</sup>
## Other Changes
* Updated Node.js to v24.15.0. [#51088](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51088)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the electron/electron release v41.3.0, fixes include resolving webContents.printToPDF rejecting on subsequent calls after a prior rejection with invalid pageRanges, preventing app-region: drag inside a hidden WebContentsView from dragging the parent window on Windows, ensuring Electron macOS updates apply even if another app blocked the system update loop, fixing a build failure when building with enable_pdf disabled, and correcting frameless transparent windows on Windows losing transparency after setResizable(false) followed by setResizable(true). Other changes update Node.js to v24.15.0.

# Release Notes for v42.0.0-beta.7
## Features
* Added JS stack trace to crash reports on renderer OOM. [#50911](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/50911)
* Added `Notification.getHistory()` for macOS, allowing developers to restore all delivered notifications still present in Notification Center. [#51123](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51123)
* Added support for heap profiling via `contentTracing.enableHeapProfiling()`. [#51162](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51162) <sup>(Also in [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51178))</sup>
* Added support for importing shared textures using the nv16 pixel format. [#51187](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51187)
## Fixes
* Ensured cross-origin `fetch()` and XHR are blocked for custom protocols registered with `supportFetchAPI: true` unless `corsEnabled: true` is also set; cross-origin `mode: 'no-cors'` requests now receive an opaque response. [#51269](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51269) <sup>(Also in [39](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51272), [40](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51271), [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51270))</sup>

* Fixed a  crash when providing invalid HTTP header names or values in the `webRequest.onBeforeSendHeaders()` callback. [#51366](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51366) <sup>(Also in [40](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51364), [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51365))</sup>
* Fixed a crash that could occur when an autofill suggestion popup was shown while a window was closing. [#51317](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51317) <sup>(Also in [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51321))</sup>
* Fixed a regression on Windows where frameless windows changed their size after calling `setResizable`. [#51296](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51296)
* Fixed a regression where frameless fullscreen windows had white borders on Windows. [#51331](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51331) <sup>(Also in [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51332))</sup>
* Fixed an issue where `app-region: drag` inside a hidden `WebContentsView` would still drag the parent window on Windows. [#51245](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51245) <sup>(Also in [40](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51247), [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51246))</sup>
* Fixed an issue where calling `contentTracing` APIs before `app.whenReady()` would crash the application. [#51353](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51353) <sup>(Also in [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51352))</sup>
* Fixed an issue where some toast notification properties didn't work as expected in WinRT. [#51330](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51330)
* Fixed buggy behavior where Backspace would accept macOS text replacements inside `contenteditable` elements. [#51344](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51344) <sup>(Also in [40](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51345), [41](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51343))</sup>

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: electron/electron
Release: electron v42.0.0
Tag: v42.0.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-06T01:10:01Z; created_at: 2026-05-05T19:07:06Z
Release notes:
# Release Notes for v42.0.0
## Stack Upgrades
* Chromium `148.0.7778.96`
* [New in 148](https://developer.chrome.com/blog/new-in-chrome-148/)
* [New in 147](https://developer.chrome.com/blog/new-in-chrome-147/)
* Node `v24.15.0`
* [Node 24.15.0 blog post](https://nodejs.org/en/blog/release/v24.15.0/)
* V8 `14.8`
## Breaking Changes
### Behavior Changed: macOS notifications now use `UNNotification` API
Electron has migrated from the deprecated `NSUserNotification` API to the `UNNotification` API on macOS. The new API requires that an application be code-signed in order for notifications to be displayed. If an application is not code-signed, notifications will emit a `failed` event on the `Notification` object. [#47817](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/47817)
### Behavior Changed: `electron` no longer downloads itself via `postinstall` script
Previously, the `electron` npm package would download the Electron binary from the repository's GitHub Releases in the package's `postinstall` script. When calling `Session.clearStorageData(options)`, the `options.quotas` object is no longer supported because it has been removed from upstream Chromium.

* Improved performance of `app.isDefaultProtocolClient()` and `app.setAsDefaultProtocolClient()` on Linux. [#51627](https://github.com/electron/electron/pull/51627)
